arts.ttl: Defeated Ajax in the top six, AZ mid-table and FC Twente in the top thirty: Europa League recap
arts.sum: Several Dutch clubs took to the pitch in Europa League action this Thursday. Recap the action with GBeNeFN and Voetbal International.

Hosts Twente currently sit in fifth place with 25 points from 13 matches. They won their most recent Eredivisie match 2-1 against Fortuna Sittard at Fortuna Sittard Stadion, extending their unbeaten s...
